scope: No-imported-anchor batch covering the next 50 pending players after batch 015. Every row receives a scored historical anchor from online roster, production, recruiting, and sentiment context before projection.
method: Skip rows already present in earlier player research batches.
Skip rows whose current-team field is blank in the projection export.
Prioritize remaining pending rows from the local projection state after batches 013 and 014 were applied.
For rows without imported historical BBPR, assign a scored historical anchor from online roster/bio/signing/recruiting context.
Use official roster/signing pages first, then reputable local/team coverage for role and sentiment context.
Calculate opportunity, talent, projection score, and projected BBPR with the same shared calibration used by the admin apply path.
Keep every row pending admin approval so official roster, signing, and role evidence can be reviewed before application.

formulas.syntheticHistoricalAnchor: No-imported-anchor players receive a researched historicalRating estimate from production, level, recruiting pedigree, physical tools, and role sentiment.
formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(anchoredPlayer, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

teamContextRubric.projectedStarter: Yes requires sourced prior production, staff language, or clear open-role context; Uncertain means rotation value without locked starting signal; No means depth/bench role.
teamContextRubric.historicalAnchor: 50+ for proven efficient D-I starters/all-conference production or elite recruiting, 38-49 for credible rotation/star-lower-level profiles, 26-37 for low-minute/development/newcomer profiles.
teamContextRubric.projectedRole: 86-88 for plausible featured/starter cases in this lower-anchor range, 76-85 for rotation players, 68-75 for depth/newcomer profiles with role caps.
teamContextRubric.opportunityChange: Rewards open usage, transfer fit, or retained-program opportunity; penalizes crowded high-major rotations and uncertain immediate translation.
teamContextRubric.offensiveBurden: Primary/secondary scorers and creators get 80+; defensive bigs, connectors, and low-usage wings stay lower.
